name: Lentil Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2 cups lentils (any color), rinsed and drained
5 cups water (or use part broth if you want)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil.
3. Reduce heat, cover the pot, and simmer for about 30-40 minutes.
4. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
5. Serve over brown rice or potatoes. Makes 4 servings.
The vegetables used can be varied based on preference. For a soup-like consistency, add more water and a can of pureed tomatoes. Potatoes can also be included in the pot with the other vegetables.
